title: Nether Geodes
description: Adds Amethyst Geodes with Black Calcite to the Nether
body:
# Nether Geodes 

Adds rarer Amethyst Geodes to the Nether, containing new Black Calcite, a great building block. These geodes have the same design as the voerworld geodes with the calcite replaced with black calcite.
Great for packs without normal overworld generation like skyblocks.

## Nether Geode
![Nether Geode](https://i.imgur.com/jNMUFik.png)
![Nether Geode](https://i.imgur.com/xt7SCsN.png)

## Black Calcite
![Black Calcite](https://i.imgur.com/mGhsxKV.png)

### Known Issues
Currently geodes are blocked from spawning in Basalt Deltas, I'm looking into a bug that casues basalt collumns to generate through the geodes, when its fixed I'll uodate to allow the geodes in basalt deltas
